channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 28-Year-Old Nyeri Woman Shares Experience as Truck Driver to Rwanda
item.description: Leah Mureithi, a 28-year-old from Nyeri County, shared her journey as a female truck driver transporting goods to Rwanda. In a video on Standard Digital, she highlighted the challenges of being a woma...

item.title: Megalotto Jackpot Winner Claims Over P97 Million
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that a single bettor won the Megalotto 6/45 jackpot, totaling more than P97 million on Friday, July 3, 2026. The winning numbers were 43-02-1...

item.title: PFIPC Scandal: Calls for Accountability of Key Officials Amid Allegations
item.description: Former Minister Solomon Dalung has accused President Bola Tinubu, Chief of Staff Femi Gbajabiamila, and other senior officials of being involved in the PFIPC scandal, demanding investigations into the...

item.title: Alberta Pipeline and Delta Port Expansion Linked
item.description: The federal government's $10-billion commitment to expanding Delta, B.C.'s container port is closely tied to Alberta's proposed pipeline project, according to analysts. The lack of a northern route fo...

item.title: NSW Government to Replace Aging Tangara Fleet with New Hunter Valley Trains
item.description: The NSW government has announced a $12 billion investment over 15 years to build next-generation Tangara trains at a new manufacturing facility in the Hunter Valley. Two potential sites—a former coal ...

item.title: Ex-Trump Official Warns of Democratic Crisis Under Trump's Leadership
item.description: Alexander Willis, a former Trump administration official and senior editor at Raw Story, warns that the United States faces a critical decision about its future under President Donald Trump. In an op-...

item.title: Digital account created for children's safety
item.description: The article discusses a media report highlighting an individual's creation of a digital account intended for their children's use. While the original title employs clickbait tactics by emphasizing sen...

item.title: Corruption allegations in R116m Gauteng school project
item.description: A Gauteng government school project worth over R116m is under investigation for alleged corruption, with a rescue contractor accusing consultants and officials of certifying non-existent construction ...

item.title: U.S. Space Force Collaborates with Private Startups for Orbital Reconnaissance Missions
item.description: Two U.S. space startups, True Anomaly and Rocket Lab, completed a high-stakes orbital mission for the U.S. Space Force, demonstrating advanced reconnaissance capabilities in space. The exercise, named...

item.title: Clashes at Samburet Estate Leave Injuries and Property Damage
item.description: Rival groups clashed at the disputed Samburet estate, leading to violence that injured youths and damaged property. Motorcycles were set on fire during the confrontation, escalating tensions over land...

item.title: Mohan Yadav Faces Allegations Over Land Holdings Amid Governance Concerns
item.description: The article discusses allegations against Madhya Pradesh Chief Minister Mohan Yadav regarding his family's expanding land holdings, which threaten his governance record. The controversy emerged during...

item.title: Rotary Club Donates Sanitary Pads to Support Schoolgirls' Hygiene in Tanzania
item.description: The Rotary Club of Dar es Salaam Oysterbay has donated 1,728 packs of sanitary pads to female students at Don Bosco Vocational Training Centre, ensuring menstruation does not disrupt their education. ...

item.title: Cape Verde Take On Messi's Argentina In Crucial World Cup Clash
item.description: Cape Verde, the smallest nation ever to reach the knockout rounds, face Lionel Messi and Argentina in a high-stakes World Cup match. The Atlantic archipelago has defied expectations by advancing past ...

item.title: Three Men Acquitted in Lyra McKee Murder Case
item.description: Three men accused of murdering journalist Lyra McKee in Northern Ireland in 2019 were found not guilty in a lengthy trial. The 29-year-old author died after being shot near police vehicles in the Creg...

item.title: 2026 Calgary Stampede Parade Draws Large Crowd
item.description: The 2026 Calgary Stampede parade, a major annual event celebrating Alberta's cultural and economic heritage, attracted thousands of spectators to downtown Calgary. Organizers reported heightened inter...

item.title: Beijing urges Australia to block Taiwan's unofficial consulate in WA
item.description: The article details diplomatic tensions between China and Australia regarding Taiwan's proposed establishment of an unofficial consulate in Western Australia. Beijing has formally protested Australia'...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Secures Spacious Apartment After Months of Living in Car
item.description: Michelle, a young Kenyan woman who had been living in her car for months while running her beauty business, celebrated her milestone of securing a spacious apartment. The emotional moment was captured...

item.title: Bird flu detected in NSW wild birds as Australia faces rising cases
item.description: A suspected case of H5 bird flu has been confirmed in a giant petrel near Hawks Nest on New South Wales' mid-north coast, marking the first detection of the virus in a wild bird in the state. Prelimin...

item.title: Fugitive Zaldy Co's graft case remains active despite Sandiganbayan's archiving decision
item.description: The Sandiganbayan has archived the criminal case against fugitive congressman Elizady 'Zaldy' Co over the P289-million flood control project in Oriental Mindoro, but legal experts clarify this adminis...

item.title: Senate Balances Flood Control Investigations with Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial
item.description: The article discusses the Senate's handling of flood control scandals versus the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. Critics accuse the Senate majority of downplaying flood control issue...
